name: Broccoli with Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the broccoli into bite-size florets.
2. Peel the stems and slice them into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
3. Steam just until tender, about 3 minutes.
4. While the broccoli is steaming, whisk the dressing ingredients in a serving bowl.
5. Add the steamed broccoli and toss to mix. Serve immediately.
6. Keeps well in the refrigerator. Dressing is tasty on other vegetables, too. Serve 4-6.
